data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): Header table row must clarify dso: agents are local plugin agents resolved via plugins/dso/agents/<name>.md, not enabledPlugins lookup. discover-agents.sh extracts 'dso' but won't find it in enabledPlugins — dso: agents are dispatched directly by orchestrators, not through discover-agents.sh. Suggested row: dso:bot-psychologist | (local plugin agent, resolved via plugins/dso/agents/)
